scripts.start:admin:when-api: node scripts/wait-for-http.mjs http://localhost:3000/api/health 45000 500 && set "NX_DAEMON=false" && pnpm nx serve admin-console
scripts.docker:teklif:ci-check: docker compose -f docker-compose.redis.yml -f docker-compose.teklif.yml up --build -d --wait hero-redis hero-teklif && timeout 60 bash -c 'until [ "$(docker inspect --format="{{.State.Health.Status}}" hero-redis)" = "healthy" ] && [ "$(docker inspect --format="{{.State.Health.Status}}" hero-teklif)" = "healthy" ]; do sleep 2; done' && pnpm run docker:ensure-teklif
scripts.start:all: pnpm docker:ensure-teklif && concurrently -k -n frontend,api,mobile "pnpm start:admin:when-api" "pnpm start:api" "pnpm start:mobile"
scripts.build:all: pnpm nx run-many -t build -p admin-console api
scripts.test:all: pnpm nx run-many -t test -p admin-console api --parallel=2
scripts.lint:all: pnpm nx run-many -t lint -p admin-console api --parallel=2
scripts.test:ci:contract: pnpm exec nx test api-interfaces && pnpm exec nx test api && pnpm exec nx test admin-console
scripts.test:ci:life-profile: pnpm run test:ci:contract && pnpm exec nx e2e admin-console-e2e --verbose
scripts.test:ci:flutter: npm run test:mobile && npm run test:mobile:integration
scripts.ci:smoke: pnpm run test:ci:life-profile && pnpm run lint:all
scripts.ci:prologue-world-seed: pnpm nx e2e admin-console-e2e -- --grep "world seed updates after activity" --project=chromium
scripts.ci:post-deploy-contract: pnpm run test:ci:life-profile && pnpm exec nx e2e api-e2e --verbose
scripts.ci:contract-schema: pnpm exec nx test api-interfaces && pnpm run test:contract-types
scripts.test:cross-device: pnpm exec tsd --config api-interfaces/tsd.json && pnpm nx test api-e2e
